affiliateCampaign.category: AI学習・オンラインスクール

caption:
AIスキルを付けたい人、実は無料から始められます📚

・経済産業省認定だから補助金が最大70%。自己負担が少なくて驚きました
・無料セミナーで基礎がわかるので、高い講座を受ける前に判断できます
・職種別コース（マーケティング・営業・人事など）だから自分の仕事に直結
・メンターが1対1でサポートしてくれるから挫折しにくい
・DMMという大手だから、教材の質と運営体制が安心できます

後で見返せるように保存👆

詳細・無料セミナー予約はプロフリンクから🔗

#AI学習 #スキルアップ #リスキリング #DMMグループ
imagePrompt:
Feed: Create a clean, modern Instagram feed image (4:5 ratio) for "DMM 生成AI CAMP" an AI learning service. Design features a light gray background, featuring a minimalist infographic showing a progression arrow with 3 stages: "Free Seminar" → "AI Learning" → "Certification". Include icons representing students, AI technology, and growth. Use a professional color palette of deep blue (#1F4788), bright cyan (#00D9FF), and white. Add subtle geometric shapes and a badge icon indicating "Ministry of Economy Certified Program". Include text elements as graphic elements only: "Up to 70% Reskilling Subsidy", "Start Free". Modern, clean typography. High-quality, professional appearance.

Reels: Create a dynamic vertical Instagram Reels/Story image (9:16 ratio) for "DMM 生成AI CAMP" featuring a white background with a bold gradient accent stripe (deep blue to cyan) on the left side. Center a large upward growth arrow with 4 milestone circles showing progression through learning stages. Use infographic-style icons: graduation cap, AI brain symbol, ascending chart, and certificate. Include vibrant accents in bright cyan and deep blue. Add geometric background elements (subtle circles and lines) for visual interest. Design conveys transformation and career growth. Modern, engaging, professional style suitable for video
